name: feature-flags
description: Private monorepo workspace — publishable packages: feature-flags-core, feature-flags-cli, feature-flags-sdk. Do not npm publish this root.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
node -e "console.error('
This root package is not published. From the repo root run:
  pnpm run publish:packages
'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter feature-flags-core build && pnpm --filter feature-flags-cli build && pnpm --filter feature-flags-sdk build
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter feature-flags-core publish --access public && pnpm --filter feature-flags-cli publish --access public && pnpm --filter feature-flags-sdk publish --access public
